# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters:
  - name: location
    type: string
    default: eastus

  - name: vmName
    type: string
    default: myWebAppVM

  - name: osDiskName
    type: string
    default: myWebAppOSDisk

  - name: dataDiskName
    type: string
    default: myWebAppDataDisk

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    name: $(vmName)
    location: $(location)
    properties:
      osProfile:
        computerName: $(vmName)
        adminUsername: myAdminUser
        adminPassword: myStrongPassword
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_DS1_v2
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
          offer: WindowsServer
          sku: 2022-Datacenter
          version: latest
        osDisk:
          name: $(osDiskName)
          caching: ReadWrite
          diskSizeGB: 128
        dataDisks:
          - name: $(dataDiskName)
            caching: ReadWrite
            diskSizeGB: 512

outputs:
  - name: vmName
    value: $(vmName)
